---
title: 'Donald F Wolfe ( 07/19/1924 - 10/27/1999)'
date: '2017-12-03T09:03:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Wolfe Family Tree'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8245950924977917511'
blogger_filename: '/2017/12/donald-f-wolfe-xxxx-xxxx.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Wolfe Family Tree/feed.atom'
---

<br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjgGbH5BQaJoDNy6Ey3i7h0SNkkSlbF9-DCoG56F3p14X_EQHpy6BVQToqoLRrxhw9dM44KNfmFbvQOy3vFZOjYC-vJNkt283VFQIAimBwOi3Sx9Zg92h5hDgIhxZI5FNKLolUUB8Szx7fldB4pw2JfiLr0ybxH3UcF3I1aZ8_gxlj3YLesZOivjrX8yAE2" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img alt="" data-original-height="460" data-original-width="609" height="240" src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjgGbH5BQaJoDNy6Ey3i7h0SNkkSlbF9-DCoG56F3p14X_EQHpy6BVQToqoLRrxhw9dM44KNfmFbvQOy3vFZOjYC-vJNkt283VFQIAimBwOi3Sx9Zg92h5hDgIhxZI5FNKLolUUB8Szx7fldB4pw2JfiLr0ybxH3UcF3I1aZ8_gxlj3YLesZOivjrX8yAE2" width="318" /></a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="https://www.newspapers.com/article/bonner-springs-edwardsville-chieftain-ob/45809468/">Obituary for Donald F. Wolfe, 1924-1999 (Aged 75) - Newspapers.comâ„¢</a></div><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div><br /></div><div>Donald F Wolfe was born 07/19/1924 to Roy Wolfe I/Sr and Esther (Wolfe, Maiden name unknown).&nbsp;</div><div><br /></div><div>He married Maryan Louise King on June 5, 1949 in Jackson, Missouri, USA</div><br /><br />Don died October 27, 1999 in Stockton CA.<br /><br /><br /><br /><br />
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-1-5f55224f50fd.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1213" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-1-d19c0160baa2.jpg" width="484" /></a></div>
<br />
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-2-4e5f169035ad.jpg" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" data-original-height="1600" data-original-width="1231" height="640" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/bettys-wolfe-family-album-donald-f-wolfe-28my-grandfather-29-2-2e2d89ddecc6.jpg" width="492" /></a></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
